subject: Fix Casablanca tagging
commit_message:
Fix Casablanca tagging

- latest tag removed from this branch so it doesn't overwrite master
branch images
- Casablanca latest images should be kept as 1.0-SNAPSHOT

Change-Id: I3f556ae86c8b106470426408f198da78a93e40e6
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-983
Signed-off-by: Filip Krzywka <filip.krzywka@nokia.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

To be tested more exhaustively in local env

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

The HV-VES Container and artifacts released were 1.0.0 (no SNAPSHOT); these artifacts were published under release repo which cannot be overridden. 

Can you clarify why issue this change is addressing? Unless there integration blocking issue raised, no patches can be applied to Casablanca branch.
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/dcaegen2-collectors-hv-ves-casablanca-verify-java/4/

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/dcaegen2-collectors-hv-ves-casablanca-verify-java/4/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/dcaegen2-collectors-hv-ves-casablanca-verify-java/4

Patch Set 2:

@Vijay

This change is required as all HV-VES CSIT testssuites are configured to use `:latest` image.

Currently both 
 - dcaegen2-collectors-hv-ves-master-docker-java-shell-daily
 - dcaegen2-collectors-hv-ves-casablanca-docker-java-shell-daily
jenkins job are pushing images tagged with `:latest` which result in that both
CSIT jobs for hv-ves are running on incorrect images. 

We want to avoid need to change both repositories (hv-ves and csit) for each patch 
version change.
We decided to change CSIT's to use new 1.0-SNAPSHOT tag (without patch version) 
in Casablanca release to allow continuous integration to work during maintenance. 
Similar change will be introduced into Dublin release (1.1-SNAPSHOT tag).
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2:

Thanks for clarification. Looping Gary from integration team for his comments.

@Gary - Current docker-manifest for HV-ves has onap/org.onap.dcaegen2.collectors.hv-ves.hv-collector-main:1.0.0. This gerrit change introduces new version change (to 1.0.1) for handling the lastest image tag updates to avoid conflict with master.

Wondering if this necessitates new hv-ves image version (1.0.1) be released and docker-manifest updated for R3 as there is no functional change? Or the other option is to retain existing patch version in Casablanca branch for this change and keep it consistent to what is released. Would you have any preference from integration team perspective?
Topic set to hv-ves-casablanca-tagging

Patch Set 2:

As noted there are no functional changes for component and only for CI pipeline, so I personally don't see objections to leave patch version unchanged. 
However changing it also doesn't affect anyone using this service, so to minimize work I suggest (and ask for :)) merging it as is.

After image is released we can also merge https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/73226/
